channel.title: Encryption on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Encryption on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB (vCore) encryption with customer-managed key
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB (vCore) now supports encryption with customer-managed keys in public preview, adding to the existing service-managed key encryption.

  • Source: Azure Updates
